# ChatArt

> ChatArt is an AI workspace for creating videos, images, music, and marketing content from simple prompts.

## Official links

- Product: https://www.chatartpro.com
- Public knowledge base: https://smb-ai-studio.github.io/chatart/

## Key pages

- Capabilities: https://smb-ai-studio.github.io/chatart/capabilities.html
- Use cases: https://smb-ai-studio.github.io/chatart/use-cases.html
- FAQ: https://smb-ai-studio.github.io/chatart/faq.html

## Audience

ChatArt is for AI creators and marketers who want to develop content across multiple creative formats in one workspace.
